calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-04-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Yejide Nelson-Glenn's Motion To Compel Defendant Volvo Cars of North America, LLC's Further Responses To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents Set One And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Set For Trial On Aug-17-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
